task_completion.description: Verify that Screaming Frog SEO Spider has crawled the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider application is open with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' in the URL bar at the top, and crawl results/progress are visible in the main window.

task_completion.description: Verify the CSS resources were exported as a CSV file to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing a CSV file (e.g., containing 'css' in the name) being saved to or located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the JavaScript resources were exported as a CSV file to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file manager showing a CSV file (e.g., containing 'js' or 'javascript' in the name) being saved to or located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the optimization report file was created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing a file named 'frontend_resources_report.txt' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the report contains the required counts and recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'frontend_resources_report.txt' are visible in a text editor, explicitly stating the total count of CSS files, the total count of JS files, and providing text that outlines optimization recommendations.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and exports.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider application interface being interacted with (e.g., clicking 'Start', viewing the 'CSS' or 'JavaScript' tabs, clicking 'Export').

integrity.description: Ensure the report contains actual analysis and not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the report should contain specific numeric values for the CSS/JS file counts and actual written recommendations, rather than just repeating the task instructions verbatim.

integrity.description: Ensure the CSV files were exported via the application and not mocked via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export process should be visible through Screaming Frog's native 'Save As' or 'Export' GUI dialogs, rather than terminal commands creating dummy CSV files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Export directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/frontend_resources_report.txt. The report must contain the total count of CSS files, total count of JS files, and optimization recommendations.
